2604.08987.title: PilotBench: A Benchmark for General Aviation Agents with Safety Constraints
2604.08987.paper_summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) advance toward embodied AI agents operating in physical environments, a fundamental question emerges: can models trained on text corpora reliably reason about complex physics while adhering to safety constraints? We address this through PilotBench, a benchmark evaluating LLMs on safety-critical flight trajectory and attitude prediction. Built from 708 real-world general aviation trajectories spanning nine operationally distinct flight phases with synchronized 34-channel telemetry, PilotBench systematically probes the intersection of semantic understanding and physics-governed prediction through comparative analysis of LLMs and traditional forecasters. We introduce Pilot-Score, a composite metric balancing 60% regression accuracy with 40% instruction adherence and safety compliance. Comparative evaluation across 41 models uncovers a Precision-Controllability Dichotomy: traditional forecasters achieve superior MAE of 7.01 but lack semantic reasoning capabilities, while LLMs gain controllability with 86--89% instruction-following at the cost of 11--14 MAE precision. Phase-stratified analysis further exposes a Dynamic Complexity Gap-LLM performance degrades sharply in high-workload phases such as Climb and Approach, suggesting brittle implicit physics models. These empirical discoveries motivate hybrid architectures combining LLMs' symbolic reasoning with specialized forecasters' numerical precision. PilotBench provides a rigorous foundation for advancing embodied AI in safety-constrained domains.
2604.08987.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）朝著在物理環境中運作的具身人工智慧代理人發展，一個根本性問題浮現：是否可以可靠地推理關於複雜物理的模型，這些模型是基於文本語料庫訓練的，同時遵循安全約束？我們通過PilotBench來解決這個問題，這是一個評估LLMs在安全關鍵的飛行軌跡和姿態預測方面的基準。PilotBench基於708條真實世界的通用航空軌跡，涵蓋九個操作上不同的飛行階段，並配有同步的34通道遙測，系統性地探討語義理解與物理驅動預測的交集，通過LLMs與傳統預測者的比較分析。我們引入Pilot-Score，一個綜合指標，平衡60%的回歸準確性與40%的指令遵循和安全合規性。在41個模型的比較評估中，揭示了一個精確度-可控性二分法：傳統預測者的平均絕對誤差（MAE）為7.01，表現優越，但缺乏語義推理能力，而LLMs在指令遵循率達到86%至89%的情況下，則以11至14的MAE精確度為代價獲得了可控性。分階段分析進一步揭示了一個動態複雜性差距——LLM的表現在爬升和進場等高工作負荷階段急劇下降，這表明隱含的物理模型脆弱。這些實證發現促使我們探索結合LLMs的符號推理與專門預測者的數值精確性的混合架構。PilotBench為在安全受限領域推進具身人工智慧提供了嚴謹的基礎。
2604.08987.author: Yalun Wu et.al.
2604.08987.authors: Yalun Wu, Haotian Liu, Zhoujun Li, Boyang Wang
